title: The most insane week in AI
summary: YouTube video summarizing major AI releases in a single week, including model updates from DeepSeek, Alibaba Qwen, Tencent, Kimi, Xiaomi, and OpenAI, as well as research projects in multimodal understanding, game environments, and image generation. The framing as "the most insane week" is editorial commentary on the pace and significance of these announcements.
